name: input-group
description: An input (or textarea) wrapped with leading and/or trailing addons (icon or text) inside one shared bordered box that focuses as a single control, shadcn's InputGroup: the group owns the focus ring while the inner control is borderless. Addons align inline-start/inline-end or stack block-start/block-end; an invalid flag shows the destructive border + ring. Ships the InputGroupTextarea variant for a multi-line control in the same group chrome.
docs: Copies the input-group partial (+ its input-group/textarea variant) to your JTE root at lievit/input-group.jte, reached as @template.lievit.input-group(name=..., leading=@`...`, trailing=@`...`). size is height-based (sm/md/lg) so the group lines up with the form controls in a toolbar; leadingAlign/trailingAlign switch an addon between inline (inline-start/inline-end) and stacked (block-start/block-end); set invalid=true for the destructive error treatment, and model=... to bind the inner control via l:model. Use @template.lievit.input-group.textarea for a multi-line control in the same chrome. The source is yours: edit freely.
